issues.criterion: careers-resource archetype sample is a login-redirect page
issues.details: careers-resource-bioinformatics-scientist/meta.json title='Login - Almac'. URL https://www.almacgroup.com/careers/resources/a-day-in-the-life-of-a-bioinformatics-scientist/ redirects to https://www.almacgroup.com/careers/almac-work-experience-hub/login/. Live spot-check confirmed same behavior. Screenshot captures login form, not archetype content.
issues.remediation: Downstream agents should be aware careers-resource sample represents a gated page. Consider substituting with a publicly accessible careers-resource URL if one exists, or note the archetype is fully gated.

issues.criterion: knowledge-library-a-phase-ii bundle page captures a 404 error page
issues.details: knowledge-library-a-phase-ii-study-evaluating-the-safety-and-efficacy-of-two-amg/meta.json title='Page not found - Almac', text_length=9619. Live spot-check confirmed 404. Screenshots exist but show an error page. Documented in README partial captures.
issues.remediation: The primary knowledge-library sample (knowledge-library/ slug) is valid. Downstream agents should use that sample as the archetype reference and disregard the 404 bundle page.

issues.details: Both page directories have the same desktop.png and mobile.png MD5 hashes (desktop: 30c0daa6ab010ec173142324419ba9b8). Both return title '- Almac' and textLen=10238 on live spot-check. The careers subdomain appears to serve identical content for these URLs regardless of path.
issues.remediation: This is a site-specific behavior: the careers WordPress sub-site serves a blank template for both URLs. The crawler correctly captured the live state. Both pages map to different archetypes (job-listing and news-post) but have no real distinguishable content.

issues.details: manifest.json sourceTruthBundle.capturedPages=25 but actual page directories in source-bundle/pages/ = 32. README claims 34 total. Three-way inconsistency.
issues.remediation: Update manifest.json sourceTruthBundle.capturedPages to 32 and README page count to 32.

issues.details: manifest.totalPages=3605 but manifest.pages array contains 3615 entries — 10-page discrepancy.
issues.remediation: Recalculate or synchronise totalPages with actual pages array length.

issues.criterion: Archetype-level sampleUrl and http_status fields are all null
issues.details: All 27 archetypes have sampleUrl: null and http_status: null at the archetype object level. The actual sample URLs are in the sampleUrls array (plural). Downstream agents expecting a sampleUrl (singular) field will find null.
issues.remediation: Populate sampleUrl (singular) from sampleUrls[0] for each archetype, or document that downstream agents should use sampleUrls array.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright headless Chromium, domcontentloaded + networkidle + body.innerText stable 500ms x2, dismissed #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, viewport 1440x900
evidence.finding: Valid real-content page. Title: '2019 Investments Centered around Cell and Gene Therapies - Almac'. Live text_length=11589, bundle text_length=11223 (delta=366, ~3%). Bundle is NOT pre-hydration.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright headless Chromium, domcontentloaded + networkidle + body.innerText stable 500ms x2, dismissed #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, viewport 1440x900
evidence.finding: Valid substitute for clinical-services-news (original /clinical-services/news/ timed out). Title: 'Almac Clinical Services Scoops National Training Award - Almac'. Live text_length=14450, bundle text_length=14084 (delta=366, ~2.6%). Full-page screenshot pHash identical to bundle.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright headless Chromium, domcontentloaded + networkidle + body.innerText stable 500ms x2, dismissed #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, viewport 1440x900
evidence.finding: Valid knowledge-expert archetype page. Title: 'Abi Pesun - Almac'. Full-page screenshot pHash identical to bundle (similarity=1.0).

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright headless Chromium, domcontentloaded + networkidle, dismissed #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, viewport 1440x900
evidence.finding: Confirmed login-redirect page. FinalURL=https://www.almacgroup.com/careers/almac-work-experience-hub/login/. Title='Login - Almac'. Documented in README Partial Captures. The careers-resource archetype sample captures auth-gated content, not real archetype content.

viewports.name: desktop
viewports.method: pHash (DCT 8x8, hamming distance) — note: viewport vs fullpage mismatch inflates hamming

evidence.finding: Manifest contains 3615 pages across 27 archetypes. Sitemap cross-check: ~3984 total sitemap URLs vs 3615 manifest (9.2% fewer, within 20% threshold). Navigation header has links covering all major site sections (diagnostics, careers, clinical-services, knowledge, etc.). Archetype categories are sensible and match site structure. Minor issues: totalPages=3605 vs pages.length=3615; archetype-level sampleUrl fields are null (sampleUrls array is populated).

header.html=206,874 bytes (non-empty), footer.html=18,043 bytes (non-empty). header.links.json=705 links, footer.links.json=16 links. header-desktop.png=20,463 bytes, footer-desktop.png=75,567 bytes. All chrome artifacts present and non-empty.

summary: PASS — bundle complete with 32 pages, all having desktop+mobile screenshots and index.html; chrome artifacts non-empty; render strategy documented; full-page pHash comparisons confirm accurate non-pre-hydration captures (similarity=1.0 on 3 spot-checked pages). Known issues documented: careers-resource redirects to login, knowledge-library-a-phase-ii captures a 404 page, minor count discrepancies in metadata fields.
